task_completion.description: Assets AST-SRV-B01, AST-ARCH-B01, and AST-UPS-B01 are tagged for relocation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OpenMaint asset list or individual asset details show the text '[RELOCATE]' appended to the Description of AST-SRV-B01, AST-ARCH-B01, and AST-UPS-B01.

task_completion.description: Asset AST-PUMP-MAIN is tagged for protection-in-place.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OpenMaint asset list or individual asset details show the text '[PROTECT]' appended to the Description of AST-PUMP-MAIN.

task_completion.description: Asset AST-PUMP-SUMP is correctly tagged for protection-in-place as a critical exception.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OpenMaint asset list or individual asset details show the text '[PROTECT]' appended to the Description of AST-PUMP-SUMP.

task_completion.description: Asset AST-DESK-B01 is correctly left untagged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the asset list or details for AST-DESK-B01 indicate that its Description has NOT been appended with '[RELOCATE]' or '[PROTECT]'.

task_completion.description: A Corrective Maintenance Work Order with Critical priority is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the creation or existence of a Corrective Maintenance Work Order in OpenMaint, and the priority field is clearly set to 'Critical'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenMaint GUI to update asset descriptions and create the work order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenMaint web interface being used to make changes, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing psql or other database commands are used to update the assets.

integrity.description: The work order was created in the OpenMaint application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The work order creation screen or list in OpenMaint is visible, not just a text file or mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires tagging specific assets in OpenMaint based on a protocol. AST-SRV-B01, AST-ARCH-B01, and AST-UPS-B01 must be tagged with '[RELOCATE]'. AST-PUMP-MAIN must be tagged with '[PROTECT]'. AST-PUMP-SUMP is a critical exception and must be tagged with '[PROTECT]'. AST-DESK-B01 is furniture and must NOT be tagged. A Corrective Maintenance Work Order with Critical priority must be created.
